set-mcp.description: Thai SET financial statements — Income, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow via SETSMART

tradingview.description: TradingView Desktop bridge — price, volume, MA, indicators via Chrome DevTools Protocol. Requires TradingView Desktop running with --remote-debugging-port=9222

playwright.description: Browser automation — click, fill forms, screenshot, test web. No API key needed.

chrome-devtools.description: Chrome DevTools Protocol — inspect DOM, network requests, console errors, performance. Requires Chrome running.

perplexity.description: Perplexity AI — live web search, deep research, reasoning. Get API key at: https://www.perplexity.ai/settings/api

firecrawl.description: Firecrawl — web scraping, crawl sites, extract structured data. Get API key at: https://www.firecrawl.dev

glif.description: Glif — generate images, video, audio, voice cloning via AI workflows. Get token at: https://glif.app/settings

hooks.command: python -c "import json,sys; f=open('data/paper_trading/portfolio_state.json',encoding='utf-8'); p=json.load(f); pos=p.get('positions',{}); cash_pct=round(p.get('cash',100000)/max(p.get('cash',100000)+sum(v.get('shares',0)*v.get('current_price',v.get('entry_price',0)) for v in pos.values()),1)*100,1); print(f'[Portfolio] {len(pos)} positions | Cash {cash_pct}% | NAV est ${p.get(\"cash\",100000)+sum(v.get(\"shares\",0)*v.get(\"current_price\",v.get(\"entry_price\",0)) for v in pos.values()):,.0f}')" 2>/dev/null || true

python -c "from pathlib import Path; import json; f=Path('memory/framework_updates.md'); lines=f.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines() if f.exists() else []; last=[l for l in lines if l.startswith('#')]; print('[Memory] Last framework update:', last[-1] if last else 'none yet')" 2>/dev/null || true

allow: Bash(python3 -m pip install requests pandas openpyxl anthropic python-pptx)
